heading: Experience World-Class Vision Care At The Best Eye Hospital In Navi Mumbai
description: Looking for the best eye hospital in Navi Mumbai? Visit Suruchi Eye hospital in Navi Mumbai & Lasik Centre for expert eye care and safe laser treatments.

Suruchi Eye Hospital has been awarded BEST BUSINESS since 2018 by ThreeBestRated 100,000+ Lives Transformed 25,000+ Successful Surgeries 25+ Years of Excellence Meet Dr. Rajesh  Kapoor A Leading Ophthalmologist & Robotic Surgeon in Navi Mumbai Dr. Rajesh Kapoor is a Robotic and Lasik Specialist in Navi Mumbai. He was awarded “Excellence in Ophthalmology” in 2017. He completed his MBBS and M.S., securing two gold medals, one silver medal, and a Certificate of Honour. After completing his Master’s in ophthalmology (M.S.), he went to England for higher training. He worked under Mr. Ridgeway (Cataract and Lasik Surgeon) at Manchester Royal Eye and Ear Hospital. He also worked under Mr. Peter Barry (Retinal Consultant) at the Royal Victoria Eye and Ear Hospital. After coming back, Dr Rajesh Kapoor established SURUCHI EYE HOSPITAL with a dream of giving the Latest Eye Care in Navi Mumbai. Expertise & Achievements 25+ years in advanced ophthalmology Pioneer in Robotic cataract surgery CONTOURA LASIK specialist Excellence Award in Ophthalmology 2017 25,000+ successful surgeries performed Why Prefer Suruchi Eye Hospital, Navi Mumbai, For Eye Treatments Your trust drives our commitment to delivering world-class eye care. Advanced Robotic Surgery NABH Certified Facility Transparent Pricing Expert Ophthalmologists Same-Day Procedures Personalised Treatment Comprehensive Eye Care Services at Suruchi Eye Hospital in Navi Mumbai Our hospital is a one-stop solution for all your ophthalmology-related needs. Robotic Cataract Surgery Revolutionary precision surgery using advanced robotics for safer, more accurate cataract removal with faster healing. CONTOURA LASIK Surgery LASIK surgery utilises a precise laser to gently reshape the front surface of your eye (cornea), thereby correcting blurry vision and reducing your dependence on glasses or contact lenses. Diabetic Retinopathy Care Specialised treatment for diabetes-related eye complications with advanced screening and management protocols. Comprehensive Eye Exams Thorough eye health assessments using the latest diagnostic equipment to detect and prevent eye problems early. Glaucoma Management Early detection and advanced treatment options to preserve your vision and prevent glaucoma progression. Pediatric Eye Care Specialised care for children’s eye health, including squint correction and vision development monitoring. Dry Eye Treatment Advanced therapeutic solutions to restore natural tear production and provide lasting relief from chronic dry eye symptoms. Cornea Treatment Comprehensive medical and surgical care for corneal disorders, including transplants, infections, and degenerative conditions to restore clear vision. Optical Treatments Precision corrective procedures and advanced lens technologies to address refractive errors and optimise visual clarity for all patients. Advanced Eye Care Technology at Suruchi Eye Hospital At Suruchi Eye Hospital, precision is not optional. It’s built into every diagnosis and treatment. We use advanced ophthalmic equipment to ensure accurate detection, safer procedures, and faster recovery for our patients. From high-resolution imaging systems to modern surgical technology, every tool is selected to improve outcomes and reduce complications. Explore the technology that supports your vision care. You're Not Alone. How do I know if I'm a suitable candidate for CONTOURA LASIK or Robotic Cataract Surgery? Determining your suitability requires a comprehensive eye examination with our specialists. We perform advanced diagnostic tests to assess your eye health, corneal thickness, and specific visual needs. Afterwards, we’ll provide a personalised recommendation during your consultation. What is the typical recovery process like after CONTOURA LASIK or Robotic Cataract Surgery? While both procedures are often performed on the same day with a rapid initial recovery, specific guidelines will be provided. For LASIK , most patients notice improved vision within hours and return to normal activities quickly. For cataract surgery , visual recovery is generally fast. We provide post-operative care instructions and follow-up appointments to ensure optimal healing and recovery. Do I need to dilate my pupils for a comprehensive eye exam, and how long does the dilation process take? For a thorough assessment of your retina and optic nerve, pupil dilation is often necessary. This temporarily blurs your near vision and increases light sensitivity, usually lasting 4-6 hours. Please plan for this and arrange for someone to drive you home if needed. The whole exam typically takes 60-90 minutes. What precautions should I take before and after my eye surgery at Suruchi Eye Hospital? We provide detailed guidelines for what to do and what to avoid before the surgery. Generally, we instruct patients to avoid wearing makeup, using strong perfumes, and to keep us informed about any medications they are taking. After surgery, you’ll receive specific care instructions, including eye drop schedules, restrictions on activities like rubbing your eyes, and essential follow-up appointments to ensure a smooth recovery. How can I schedule an emergency eye appointment at Suruchi Eye Hospital in Navi Mumbai? For eye emergencies, please call our dedicated emergency care line immediately. Our team is equipped to guide you on the next steps.
